extraction.one_line_summary: HENAO held off CONTADOR by 2 seconds after Contador attacked on the penultimate Cat 1 climb and held virtual lead until final 100 meters
tactical_patterns: CONTADOR attacked two climbs from finish on Cat-1 terrain, too early to sustain virtual lead through final kilometers.
SKY's HENAO survived via HENAO and LOPEZ pacing after initial detonation, showing depth beats solo aggression on multi-climb finales.
CONTADOR collected time bonuses at intermediate sprint before final climbs, revealing GC calculation integrating bonuses into deficit math.

rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: positive: attacking 31 seconds down with two Cat-1s remaining nearly succeeded, signals peak form ahead of Tour
rider_signals.HENAO Sergio: positive: survived aggressive isolation tactics with only two domestiques functional in finale
rider_signals.HENAO Sebastian: positive: critical domestique work preventing CONTADOR's virtual lead from becoming insurmountable
rider_signals.LOPEZ David: positive: key Sky domestique alongside HENAO keeping CONTADOR within reach after initial group split
